use_cases: Displaying success messages after form submissions or completed actions
Showing warning messages for validation issues or important notices
Presenting error messages when operations fail or validation errors occur
Providing informational announcements or system status updates
Alerting users to critical actions requiring acknowledgment
ai_summary: A versatile alert component with four variants (information, success, warning, error) featuring gradient styling, colored icon containers, and Framer Motion animations. Built with Tailwind CSS and class-variance-authority for flexible theming, this notification component integrates seamlessly into any modern web application requiring user feedback messaging.
